docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY JANS, DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT LANNG, CHRISTIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-03-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-03-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-03-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF DONALD JANS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTIAN LANNG IS NOT PRESENT. CASE COMBINED WITH CSM 19-861920. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF OCT-29-2020 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION AND CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO DEC-17-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 (W. TRUPEK 506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LANNG, CHRISTIAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JANS, DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LANNG, CHRISTIAN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,115.00, AWARD IS FOR DAMAGES MORE THAN SECURITY DEPOSIT. THIS DAMAGE INCLUDES LOSS OF ANTIQUE LIGHT FIXTURE ALLEGED IN ACTIONS CSM-19-861920. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED. NO APPEARANCES. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED FILED ON DECEMBER 20, 2020. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED NOV-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LANNG, CHRISTIAN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT (SC-290), FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LANNG, CHRISTIAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-03-2020 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LANNG, CHRISTIAN HEARING SET FOR OCT-29-2020 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2020 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-11-2021 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. (506)
